positive: A stunning, minimalist forest animal silhouette print featuring a stylized bear climbing a branch, surrounded by abstract, geometric foliage shapes. The style is modern woodcut/linocut, emphasizing bold, solid black shapes against a crisp, light cream background. Focus on dramatic negative space, clean lines, and high contrast. Composition should be centered, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Use a limited palette of black and deep forest green for accents. Flat graphic design, vector style, highly detailed, symmetrical elements, clean silhouette, art deco influence, high resolution.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, photorealistic, blurred, low detail, noise, grainy, artifacts, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, grayscale
